response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack web development, backend microservices, and software craftsmanship, but lacks the core hardware-software co-design, SoC modeling, and AI accelerator optimization expertise required for this Principal Performance Architect role.
strengths: Over 12 years of software engineering experience, easily meeting the minimum baseline for years of technical experience.
Demonstrated ability to work with performance-oriented and systems-level languages such as DLang, C, and C++.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, system architecture, microservices, and CI/CD pipelines.
concerns: No demonstrated experience with System-on-Chip (SoC) or IP modeling, which is a primary requirement.
Lacks expertise in deep neural network training, inference optimization, and AI hardware accelerators.
Career history is heavily focused on web, GIS, and mobile applications rather than hardware-software co-design or GPU architecture.
